payload.author: claude
payload.body: DONE (subagent + integrated). src/gossip.js: paired LAN hubs push/pull the event log directly over the existing mTLS device-cert machinery - no central host. fs-bus-triggered debounced rounds (~100ms path) + interval catch-up; peers matched by workspace KEY; mesh-safe (ULID-idempotent, transitive propagation); per-peer error isolation. discoverLanPeers via Bonjour. Wired: scope serve --gossip [--gossip-peer url] with --gossip-cert/key/ca or SCOPE_GOSSIP_* (credential = the device cert from pairing against the peer). test/gossip.test.js: two real mTLS servers converge both directions <2s; idempotent re-rounds; clean teardown. Acceptance met.
